hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '^git\s+push'; then superx-state check-quality-gates; fi

INPUT=$(cat); CONTENT=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.content // .tool_input.new_string // empty'); if [ -z "$CONTENT" ]; then exit 0; fi; if echo "$CONTENT" | grep -qiE '(//\s*TODO|#\s*TODO|FIXME|XXX|NotImplementedError|unimplemented!\(\)|todo!\(\)|placeholder|\bstub\b|\bshim\b)'; then echo '{"error": "BLOCKED: stub/placeholder code detected. Write real implementation or explain why you cannot."}'; exit 2; fi; if echo "$CONTENT" | grep -qE 'throw new Error\(["'"'"'"]not implemented["'"'"'"]\)'; then echo '{"error": "BLOCKED: stub/placeholder code detected. Write real implementation or explain why you cannot."}'; exit 2; fi; if echo "$CONTENT" | grep -qE '^\s*pass\s*$'; then echo '{"error": "BLOCKED: stub/placeholder code detected. Write real implementation or explain why you cannot."}'; exit 2; fi; if echo "$CONTENT" | grep -qE '\(\)\s*=>\s*\{\s*\}|function\s*\(\)\s*\{\s*\}'; then echo '{"error": "BLOCKED: stub/placeholder code detected. Write real implementation or explain why you cannot."}'; exit 2; fi

if [ -f superx-state.json ]; then superx-state mark-dirty 2>/dev/null || true; fi; if [ -f .superx-no-autocommit ]; then exit 0; fi; count=$(git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null | wc -l); if [ "$count" -ge 5 ] && [ -d .git ]; then git add -A && git commit -m "superx: auto-checkpoint ($count files)" --no-verify 2>/dev/null || true; fi

if [ ! -f superx-state.json ]; then superx-state init 2>/dev/null || true; fi; if [ -f .planning/CHECKPOINT.md ]; then echo "[superx] Checkpoint found — read .planning/CHECKPOINT.md to resume."; elif [ -f .planning/STATE.md ]; then echo "[superx] State found — read .planning/STATE.md for prior context."; fi

if [ -f .superx-no-autocommit ]; then exit 0; fi; if [ -d .git ] && [ -n "$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null)" ]; then git add -A && git commit -m "superx: session-end checkpoint" --no-verify 2>/dev/null || true; fi
